title: Creatified+
description: A performance-optimized Fabric modpack built around Create, RPG progression, and rich world generation. Crafted and fine-tuned  for immersive, stable, and creative gameplay. Over 250 hand-picked and configured mods.
body:
### Creatified+
A carefully curated Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric modpack combining the mechanical ingenuity of Create, deep RPG systems, and expansive exploration.

### ✨ Core Features
- ⚙️ Create mod ecosystem — automation, contraptions, machinery, and tech-based expansions
- 🧭 RPG & Skills — puffish_skills, Spell Engine, and many class-based systems
- 🌍 Exploration & World Gen — Terralith, CTOV, When Dungeons Arise, Wilder Wild, and YUNG’s structures
- 🧱 Decoration & Building — Macaw’s suite, Another Furniture, and dozens of decor-focused mods
- ⚡ Performance Optimization — Sodium, FerriteCore, Starlight, Dynamic FPS, and more
- 🖥️ UI & QoL — BetterF3, FancyMenu, ModernUI, Jade, inventory tools, and immersive visuals
- 👥 Multiplayer-Friendly — Includes Essential, allowing you to invite friends into your singleplayer world without a dedicated server

Whether you’re building the factory of your dreams, delving into dungeons for loot and XP, or just exploring, Creatified+ is designed to support it all — without sacrificing performance or style.

🛠️ Fabric-based. Built with care. Optimized for survival.

### ❓ FAQ
Q: Can I play with friends without running a server?
- Yes! The included Essential mod allows you to easily invite friends into your singleplayer world, just like hosting a local game — no extra setup needed.

Q: Do I need a beefy PC to run it?
- While this pack is large, it’s built with many optimization mods like Sodium, FerriteCore, and Dynamic FPS to ensure it's playable even on mid-range machines.
